Ready to review your plot? We begin with a free call and a free preliminary concept — a paid agreement starts only once the direction is clear and aligned.

Share the plot location and estimated budget. We will review the details and get back to you within two business days to define the right next step.

Start typing to get faster suggestions when Google Maps is enabled.

Frequently asked questions about private villa design

How much does private villa design cost?

Cost depends on the plot size, scope of work, and required deliverables. We always start with a free call and a free preliminary concept, and clarify the full cost and path before any paid agreement.

Do you design villas remotely outside Jeddah?

Yes. We serve clients in Jeddah, Saudi Arabia, and the Gulf in person or remotely via video calls and shared drawings, keeping the same clarity at every step.

What deliverables do I get?

From the architectural concept and interior direction through to build-ready design that aligns consultants and contractors and protects the project’s original vision.

How long does villa design take?

It varies with the size and complexity of the project. We outline the expected timeline within the preliminary concept before any paid work begins.

When does payment start?

The first call and preliminary concept are completely free; a paid agreement only begins after the vision is clear and the direction is agreed.

WB Studio

A personal architecture practice for private villas and homes across Jeddah, Saudi Arabia and the Gulf — shaped by clarity, restraint and long-term value.
